sections.short-biography: Cao Yin forged a decree against Wang Rui, claiming it was Wen Yi’s orders.

full_text:
Wen Yi
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wen Yi. Cao Yin forged a decree against Wang Rui, claiming it was Wen Yi’s orders. Wen Yi was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
